summary: Frontend testing for Journal d'Activité Timeline Immersive design refonte. All 11 test cases PASSED. The new Timeline Immersive design with dark premium header, glassmorphism panels, colored timeline nodes, and modern card design is working correctly.

minor.issue: Intermittent 500 errors from external API - not a code issue, external dependency

engins_page.page_loads: PASS - Engins page loads correctly with vignette grid view
engins_page.localiser_buttons: PASS - Found 10 Localiser buttons with .lt-vcard-geo class
engins_page.vignette_cards: PASS - Square vignette cards with badges (Sortie/Entrée, status, famille, tag)

journal_dialog.dialog_opens: PASS - Dialog opens when clicking Localiser button
journal_dialog.dark_header: PASS - Dark premium gradient header (linear-gradient 135deg #1E293B to #334155)
journal_dialog.asset_name: PASS - Asset name 'VEN111-2' displayed in header with white text
journal_dialog.subtitle: PASS - 'Journal d'activité' subtitle displayed
journal_dialog.lastseen_card: PASS - LastSeen glassmorphism card with pulsing green dot, date/time, location info

leaflet_map.map_container: PASS - Leaflet map container found and loaded
leaflet_map.marker_visible: PASS - Red marker visible on map showing asset location

timeline_panel.glassmorphism_panel: PASS - Timeline panel with glassmorphism effect (backdrop-filter: blur(20px))
timeline_panel.panel_title: PASS - Panel title 'Enter_Exit' with history icon
timeline_panel.close_button: PASS - Red close button in panel header
timeline_panel.timeline_cards: PASS - Found 10 timeline cards with modern design
timeline_panel.colored_nodes: PASS - Found 10 timeline dots with colored borders (green for ENTRÉE, red for SORTIE)
timeline_panel.timeline_badges: PASS - Found 10 timeline badges showing Entrée/Sortie status
timeline_panel.duration_pills: PASS - Found 10 duration pills showing time spent (e.g., '504 day 6 hr 57 min', '20 hr 55 min')
timeline_panel.site_links: PASS - Clickable site names (ClientTaib, DEPOT OMNIYAT) in blue
timeline_panel.vertical_line: PASS - Vertical timeline line connecting nodes

dashboard_regression.operations_monitor: PASS - Dashboard loads correctly with Operations Monitor header
dashboard_regression.kpi_cards: PASS - KPI cards showing Engins (11/4935), Tags (12/53), etc.
dashboard_regression.no_regression: PASS - Dashboard working correctly after Journal d'Activité modifications

timeline_immersive_design_verified.lt_journal_dialog: PASS - .lt-journal-dialog class applied with rounded corners and shadow
timeline_immersive_design_verified.lt_journal_header: PASS - Dark gradient header with asset icon, name, subtitle
timeline_immersive_design_verified.lt_journal_lastseen: PASS - Glassmorphism LastSeen card with blur effect
timeline_immersive_design_verified.lt_timeline_panel: PASS - Glassmorphism panel with backdrop-filter blur(20px)
timeline_immersive_design_verified.lt_timeline_card: PASS - Modern card design with white background and subtle border
timeline_immersive_design_verified.lt_timeline_node: PASS - Vertical timeline with colored dots and connecting line
timeline_immersive_design_verified.lt_timeline_dot: PASS - Colored border dots (green #10B981 for entry, red #EF4444 for exit)
timeline_immersive_design_verified.lt_timeline_badge: PASS - Status badges with colored background and icon
timeline_immersive_design_verified.lt_timeline_duration: PASS - Duration pills with clock icon and formatted time
timeline_immersive_design_verified.lt_timeline_site: PASS - Clickable site links in blue

critical_code_review_comments: React warnings about unique 'key' props in HistoryListComponent - minor issue, not affecting functionality
Mixed content warnings for Google Maps tiles (http vs https) - auto-upgraded by browser
WebSocket connection errors to omniyat.is-certified.com - external dependency issue
context_for_next_testing_agent: Journal d'Activité Timeline Immersive design fully tested and working. The Dialog opens from Engins page when clicking 'Localiser' button on asset cards. Features verified: 1) Dark premium header with asset name and LastSeen glassmorphism card, 2) Leaflet map with marker, 3) Glassmorphism timeline panel on right side with Enter_Exit title, 4) Timeline cards with colored nodes (green for ENTRÉE, red for SORTIE), 5) Duration pills, clickable site names, and vertical connecting line. All CSS classes from logitag-saas.css are properly applied. External API (omniyat.is-certified.com) has intermittent 500 errors but this is not a code issue.
